subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Be thou a true companion unto the friends, and not as an aged hyena, burdensome unto their hearts. Glory be to God, his very presence is a weight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء یاران را یار شاطری نه چون پیر کفتار بارخاطر سبحان الله وجودش اثقل
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
